# Orchestration Scheduling

Inspect and manage scheduled-flow lifecycle commands.

## kiri flows

Scheduled-flow lifecycle.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri flows [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri flows delete`](#kiri-flows-delete) - Remove a scheduled flow from the platform.
- [`kiri flows list`](#kiri-flows-list) - List flows registered on the target's...
- [`kiri flows pause`](#kiri-flows-pause) - Pause a scheduled flow - stop the cron...
- [`kiri flows recs`](#kiri-flows-recs) - Show Kiri's recommendations for a flow...
- [`kiri flows resume`](#kiri-flows-resume) - Resume a previously-paused scheduled flow.
- [`kiri flows runs`](#kiri-flows-runs) - List recent runs from slice-5...
- [`kiri flows sync`](#kiri-flows-sync) - Reconcile ``flows/*.yml`` with the platform.
- [`kiri flows trigger`](#kiri-flows-trigger) - Fire the flow now, ad-hoc.

### kiri flows delete

Remove a scheduled flow from the platform.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri flows delete [OPTIONS] NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `NAME` | Flow name on the platform | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--target` | Target environment from kiri.yml | no | dev |  |
| `--project` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--confirm`, `--no-confirm` | Required - delete is irreversible | no | False |  |

### kiri flows list

List flows registered on the target's...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri flows list [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--target` | Target environment from kiri.yml | no | dev |  |
| `--project` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--name-prefix` | Filter to jobs whose name starts with this prefix. Defaults to the project's orchestration.job_name_prefix resolver. | no |  |  |

```text
Usage: kiri flows pause [OPTIONS] NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

### kiri flows recs

Show Kiri's recommendations for a flow...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri flows recs [OPTIONS] NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `NAME` | Flow name | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--window-days` | Analysis window | no | 30 |  |
| `--database-url` | Override run-history DATABASE_URL | no |  |  |
| `--json` | Emit JSON | no | False |  |

Resume a previously-paused scheduled flow.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri flows resume [OPTIONS] NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `NAME` | Flow name on the platform | yes |  |  |

### kiri flows runs

List recent runs from slice-5...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri flows runs [OPTIONS] NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `NAME` | Flow name | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project` | Accepted for CLI-surface compatibility but unused: this command reads only the automation run-history DB (--database-url / DATABASE_URL) and needs no kiri.yml. | no |  |  |
| `--window-days` | History window | no | 30 |  |
| `--limit` | Max rows | no | 50 |  |
| `--database-url` | Override run-history DATABASE_URL | no |  |  |

### kiri flows sync

Reconcile ``flows/*.yml`` with the platform.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri flows sync [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--target` | Target environment from kiri.yml | no | dev |  |
| `--project` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--flows-dir` | Directory holding flows/*.yml files | no | flows |  |
| `--plan-only`, `--no-plan-only` | Print the diff but don't apply | no | False |  |
| `--dry-run` | Compile and print scheduled job specs without contacting the target platform. | no | False |  |
| `--prune`, `--no-prune` | Delete platform-side jobs not in YAML | no | False |  |
